name: shared-agent-memory
description: API-backed MCP server for shared AI agent memory across Codex, Claude Code, and team projects.

interface.shortDescription: Team memory RAG for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Shared Agent Memory gives Codex and other MCP clients a common searchable memory layer, with project-aware writes and a Stop hook that reminds agents to keep durable learnings current.
defaultPrompt: Search shared memory before changing this repo.
Store durable architecture or workflow learnings in shared memory.
